# MacContainer.dev
> Production deployment guide for macOS containerization — Docker, OrbStack, Colima, Compose alternatives, stack templates.

## Core pages
Page: https://maccontainer.dev/
Page: https://maccontainer.dev/installation/ — Install Docker, OrbStack, or Colima on Apple Silicon
Page: https://maccontainer.dev/pricing/ — Production Guide pricing
Page: https://maccontainer.dev/production-guide/ — Full production manual

## Guides
Page: https://maccontainer.dev/compose-alternative/ — Docker Compose alternatives for macOS
Page: https://maccontainer.dev/stack-templates/ — Production-ready stack templates
Page: https://maccontainer.dev/faq/ — Common questions about macOS containerization

Page: https://maccontainer.dev/privacy/
